__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: InfluxDB v2
__inputs.description: InfluxDB v2 datasource configured for Flux

description: Cloudflare analytics observability dashboard backed by the cloudflare-influxdbv2 Bash collector.

panels.description: Total request count over the selected range from cloudflare_analytics.cfRequestsAll.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cfRequestsAll")
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> yield(name: "total_requests")

panels.title: Total Requests

panels.description: Total bandwidth over the selected range from cloudflare_analytics.cfBandwidthAll.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cfBandwidthAll")
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> yield(name: "total_bandwidth")

panels.title: Total Bandwidth

panels.description: Total visit count over the selected range from cloudflare_analytics.cfVisits.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cfVisits")
  |> group()

panels.title: Total Visits

panels.description: Country with the highest latest request count.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_country")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> group(columns: ["country"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.country, requests: r._value}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "requests"])

panels.title: Top Country

  |> group(columns: ["hostname"])
  |> last()

  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.hostname, requests: r._value}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "requests"])

panels.title: Top Path

panels.description: Daily request totals over the selected range.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cfRequestsAll")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "zone"])

panels.title: Requests Over Time

panels.description: Daily bandwidth totals over the selected range.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cfBandwidthAll")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Bandwidth Over Time

panels.description: Daily visits over the selected range.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)

panels.title: Visits Over Time

panels.description: Country lookup geomap using ISO alpha-3 country codes derived from Cloudflare alpha-2 country tags.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_country")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.country)
  |> group(columns: ["country"])
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with country_iso3: if r.country == "CH" then "CHE" else if r.country == "US" then "USA" else if r.country == "CA" then "CAN" else if r.country == "IE" then "IRL" else if r.country == "SE" then "SWE" else if r.country == "KR" then "KOR" else if r.country == "BR" then "BRA" else if r.country == "LT" then "LTU" else r.country}))
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "requests"})
  |> keep(columns: ["country", "country_iso3", "requests"])

panels.title: Requests By Country

panels.description: Country lookup geomap using ISO alpha-3 country codes derived from Cloudflare alpha-2 country tags.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_country")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bandwidth")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.country)
  |> group(columns: ["country"])
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with country_iso3: if r.country == "CH" then "CHE" else if r.country == "US" then "USA" else if r.country == "CA" then "CAN" else if r.country == "IE" then "IRL" else if r.country == "SE" then "SWE" else if r.country == "KR" then "KOR" else if r.country == "BR" then "BRA" else if r.country == "LT" then "LTU" else r.country}))
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "bandwidth"})
  |> keep(columns: ["country", "country_iso3", "bandwidth"])

panels.title: Bandwidth By Country

panels.description: Top countries by latest request count, with bandwidth and visits.

targets.query:
base = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_country")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)

requests = base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> group(columns: ["country"])
  |> last()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "requests"})
  |> keep(columns: ["country", "requests"])

bandwidth = base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bandwidth")
  |> group(columns: ["country"])
  |> last()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "bandwidth"})
  |> keep(columns: ["country", "bandwidth"])

visits = base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "visits")
  |> group(columns: ["country"])
  |> last()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "visits"})
  |> keep(columns: ["country", "visits"])

countryTraffic = join(tables: {requests: requests, bandwidth: bandwidth}, on: ["country"])

join(tables: {traffic: countryTraffic, visits: visits}, on: ["country"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["requests"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)
  |> keep(columns: ["country", "requests", "bandwidth", "visits"])

panels.title: Top Countries

panels.description: Top hostnames by latest requests.

targets.query:
base = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_hostname")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)

requests = base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> group(columns: ["hostname"])
  |> last()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "requests"})
  |> keep(columns: ["hostname", "requests"])

bandwidth = base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bandwidth")
  |> group(columns: ["hostname"])
  |> last()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "bandwidth"})
  |> keep(columns: ["hostname", "bandwidth"])

join(tables: {requests: requests, bandwidth: bandwidth}, on: ["hostname"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["requests"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)
  |> keep(columns: ["hostname", "requests", "bandwidth"])

panels.title: Top Hostnames

panels.description: Top 5 hostnames over time by requests.

targets.query:
metric = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_hostname")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")

topHosts = metric
  |> group(columns: ["hostname"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 5)
  |> keep(columns: ["hostname"])

join(tables: {metric: metric, hosts: topHosts}, on: ["hostname"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "hostname"])

panels.title: Top 5 Hostnames Over Time

panels.description: Top paths by latest requests and bandwidth.

targets.query:
base = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_path")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)

requests = base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> group(columns: ["path"])
  |> last()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "requests"})
  |> keep(columns: ["path", "requests"])

bandwidth = base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bandwidth")
  |> group(columns: ["path"])
  |> last()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "bandwidth"})
  |> keep(columns: ["path", "bandwidth"])

join(tables: {requests: requests, bandwidth: bandwidth}, on: ["path"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["requests"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)
  |> keep(columns: ["path", "requests", "bandwidth"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_path")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)

panels.description: HTTP status distribution.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> group(columns: ["status"])

panels.title: HTTP Status Distribution

panels.description: HTTP status counts over time.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "status"])

panels.title: Status Codes Over Time

panels.description: Latest 4xx and 5xx counts.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.status =~ /^4/ or r.status =~ /^5/)
  |> group(columns: ["status"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

panels.title: 4xx / 5xx Requests

panels.description: Cache hit/miss distribution.

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_cache")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> group(columns: ["cache_status"])

panels.title: Cache HIT/MISS Ratio

panels.description: Bandwidth by cache status.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_cache")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bandwidth")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "cache_status"])

panels.title: Cached vs Uncached Bandwidth

panels.description: Request cache efficiency percentage.

targets.query:
data = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics_cache")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.zone =~ /^${zone:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")
  |> group(columns: ["cache_status"])
  |> last()
  |> group()

total = data
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "total"})
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with join_key: "cache"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["join_key", "total"])

hit = data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.cache_status =~ /hit|HIT|Hit/)
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "hit"})
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with join_key: "cache"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["join_key", "hit"])

join(tables: {hit: hit, total: total}, on: ["join_key"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _value: if r.total == 0 then 0.0 else float(v: r.hit) / float(v: r.total) * 100.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: Cache Efficiency

list.definition:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics")
  |> keep(columns: ["zone"])
  |> distinct(column: "zone")
  |> rename(columns: {zone: "_value"})
list.label: Zone
list.name: zone
list.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cloudflare_analytics")
  |> keep(columns: ["zone"])
  |> distinct(column: "zone")
  |> rename(columns: {zone: "_value"})

title: Cloudflare Analytics - InfluxDB v2
